changes.summary: New BC-12 GetRuntimeConfigUseCase centralizes public SPA bootstrap config (inv-17): typed ConfigService paths only for oauth/authn/sms/phone/email/feature flags; no secrets or raw process.env. commentVoting delegates to PermissionGatesPort.isCommentVotingEnabled (inv-19). Exports PublicRuntimeConfig type and createGetRuntimeConfigUseCase factory.
Removed process.env.ENABLE_COMMENT_VOTING (V-07). VoteService injects PERMISSION_GATES_PORT and gates comment votes via permissionGates.isCommentVotingEnabled() (inv-19).

notes: GetRuntimeConfigUseCase not wired into config.controller, config.router, or _bootstrap.ts (outside write_set). VoteService PERMISSION_GATES_PORT binding assumed from existing permissions module registration.
